modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to modify document types or custom properties in ImageNow

full_description_text:  
The user is looking to make changes to document types or custom properties in ImageNow. They want to add new doc types, change existing ones to non-USD objects, and also remove some doc types from the USD application plans. This request seems to be part of their ongoing work with Perceptive Content.
